spell.description: You hurl a loose, unattended object that is within range and that has 1 Bulk or less at the target. Make a spell attack roll against the target's AC. If you hit, you deal bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage—as appropriate for the object you hurled—equal to 1d6 plus your spellcasting ability modifier.

effect.name: Immune
effect.description: Temporarily immune to a specific ability (e.g. Guidance, Battle Medicine, Tell Fortune). Applied automatically on use and cleared when the game clock passes its expiry.

effect.name: Aid
effect.description: +2 circumstance bonus to the next attack roll or save (Aid critical success: +3).

effect.name: Aid (Critical Success)
effect.description: +3 circumstance bonus to the next attack roll or save.

effect.name: Antidote
effect.description: +2 item bonus to Fortitude saves against poisons (Lesser; Moderate antidote is +3). The bonus is conditional ('vs poison'), so it is shown as a reminder beneath the Fortitude save rather than netted into the always-on number. Lasts 6 hours.

effect.name: Antiplague
effect.description: +2 item bonus to Fortitude saves against diseases (Lesser; Moderate antiplague is +3), including the daily save against a disease's progression. The bonus is conditional ('vs disease'), so it is shown as a reminder beneath the Fortitude save rather than netted into the always-on number. Lasts 24 hours.

effect.name: Avoiding Notice
effect.description: Successful Stealth check at start of exploration — Hidden from creatures that haven't noticed you.

effect.name: Beacon Shot
effect.description: Embedded with a sparking beacon shot for 1 minute. An invisible creature becomes merely hidden to creatures who couldn't otherwise see it, and a concealed creature loses the concealed condition. Remove with an Interact action and a DC 20 Athletics check.

effect.name: Bless
effect.description: +1 status bonus to attack rolls while within the emanation.

effect.name: Defend
effect.description: Moving at half Speed with your shield raised: +2 circumstance bonus to Perception checks to detect hazards. You cannot be surprised, and can use Shield Block while traveling.

effect.name: Devoted Guardian
effect.description: +1 circumstance bonus to AC while your guardian stays adjacent with their shield raised.

effect.name: Devoted Guardian (Tower Shield)
effect.description: +2 circumstance bonus to AC while your guardian stays adjacent with their tower shield raised.

effect.name: Dirge of Doom
effect.description: Enemies in range are Frightened 1 (no save). Manual — apply Frightened via conditions.

effect.name: Roll the Plates
effect.description: +1 circumstance bonus to AC against the triggering melee attack (Dragon Turtle Plate reaction).

effect.name: Drakeheart Mutagen (Moderate)
effect.description: +5 item bonus to AC and +2 item bonus to Perception, with a −1 item penalty to Will and Reflex saves and a Dexterity cap of +2 (all netted into the sheet; the cap composes with your armor's, lowest wins). The −1 penalty to Recall Knowledge checks is shown as a reminder on each Recall-Knowledge skill. You can burn the remaining duration to Stride twice (1 action).

effect.name: Eagle-eye Elixir
effect.description: +1 item bonus to Perception (Lesser; Moderate elixir is +2). The greater +2/+3 bonus to find secret doors and traps shows as a conditional reminder — an extra +1 on top of the netted Perception bonus. Lasts 1 hour.

effect.name: Charged (Eld)
effect.description: Off-guard against attacks that deal electricity damage (still descriptive — no AC-vs-type surface) and −2 to saves against electric effects (now shown as a reminder beneath each save). Ends when the encounter ends, on taking electricity damage, or by Discharging to empower another electric Eld power.

effect.name: Rust Cloud
effect.description: A 20-foot emanation of billowing rust: creatures inside are concealed, and creatures outside are concealed to those inside. Lasts 10 minutes, until Dismissed (2 actions), or until you fall unconscious.

effect.name: Shrouded
effect.description: All light within 20 feet is lowered one step in intensity (bright → dim, dim → darkness). Lasts until the end of your turn.

effect.name: Fly (spell)
effect.description: Character gains a fly Speed equal to their land Speed. Track manually.

effect.name: Gecko Potion
effect.description: +1 item bonus to Climb and to Palm an Object (shown as conditional reminders on the Athletics and Thievery cards), and you can cling to surfaces. Lasts 5 minutes.

effect.name: Harrow Casting — Key
effect.description: +1 status bonus to AC and all saving throws until the start of your next turn (Harrow Casting, Key drawn).

effect.name: Harrow Casting — Key (omen match)
effect.description: +2 status bonus to AC and all saving throws until the start of your next turn (Harrow Casting, Key drawn matching the Keys omen).

effect.name: Harrow Casting — Star (omen match)
effect.description: +2 status bonus to all saving throws until the start of the caster's next turn (Harrow Casting, Star drawn matching the Stars omen).

effect.name: Heroism (Rank 1–3)
effect.description: +1 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception, and saving throws for 10 minutes.

effect.name: Heroism (Rank 4–6)
effect.description: +2 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception, and saving throws for 10 minutes.

effect.name: Heroism (Rank 7+)
effect.description: +3 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception, and saving throws for 10 minutes.

effect.name: Blood Magic — AC (Imperial)
effect.description: +1 status bonus to AC until the start of your next turn (Imperial blood magic).

effect.name: Blood Magic — Saving Throws (Imperial)
effect.description: +1 status bonus to all saving throws until the start of your next turn (Imperial blood magic).

effect.name: Inspire Courage
effect.description: +1 status bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls while the composition lasts.

effect.name: Inspire Courage (+2)
effect.description: +2 status bonus to attack rolls (Maestro dedication or Lingering Composition).

effect.name: Mage Armor
effect.description: +1 item bonus to AC (unarmored only in practice). Lasts until next daily prep.

effect.name: Runic Body
effect.description: +1 status bonus to attack rolls (from fundamental rune bonus on unarmed attacks).

effect.name: Shield (spell)
effect.description: +1 circumstance bonus to AC until the start of your next turn.

effect.name: Shining Guidance
effect.description: You and your allies gain a +1 circumstance bonus to attack rolls against the limned creature while it stays limned (Izzy's Shining Guidance, #225). Conditional ('vs limned target') — it surfaces as an opt-in toggle in the attack resolver, applied to the target you choose. Applied to the party automatically when Shining Guidance's save resolves to anything but a critical success; lasts until the end of your next turn (two rounds on a critical failure — re-apply if needed).

effect.name: Treat Poison
effect.description: +2 circumstance bonus to saving throws against the poison being treated.

effect.name: Treat Wounds Immunity
effect.description: Cannot be healed by Treat Wounds or Battle Medicine from the specific healer who applied this effect. Applied automatically on a successful Treat Wounds or Battle Medicine check. Remove to allow re-treatment.

effect.name: Upstage
effect.description: +1 status bonus to attack rolls, Perception, saving throws, and skill checks until the end of your next turn.

effect.name: Waterbreathing
effect.description: You can breathe underwater. Lasts 1 hour.

rune.name: Aim-Aiding
rune.description: Armor etched with this rune aids in routing ranged attacks aimed at an enemy around you. You don't provide enemies cover against your allies' ranged attacks.

riders.text: You don't grant enemies cover against your allies' ranged attacks.

rune.name: Dread (Lesser)
rune.description: Eerie symbols cover your armor, inspiring terror in your foes. Frightened enemies within 30 feet that can see you must attempt a DC 20 Will save at the end of their turn; on a failure, the value of their frightened condition doesn't decrease below 1 that turn.

riders.text: Frightened foes within 30 ft that can see you save DC 20 Will or stay frightened ≥1.

aura.effect: the frightened value doesn't drop below 1 this turn

rune.name: Quenching
rune.description: This rune counters burning and corrosive agents. Armor with this rune reduces the DC of the flat check to end persistent acid or fire damage affecting you from 15 to 12 (7 with particularly effective assistance).

riders.text: Persistent acid/fire flat check DC 15 → 12 (7 with effective assistance).

rune.name: Ready
rune.description: A ready rune lets you don or remove the etched armor in only a few seconds rather than minutes.

riders.text: Don or remove this armor as a single action (1 action) rather than minutes.

rune.name: Shadow
rune.description: Shadow runes make armor lighter and softer. While wearing the etched armor, you gain a +1 item bonus to Stealth checks.

rune.name: Slick
rune.description: The defenses provided by this rune make it harder for foes to grab you. While wearing the etched armor, you gain a +1 item bonus to Acrobatics checks to Escape and to Squeeze.

riders.text: Bonus applies only to Acrobatics checks to Escape or Squeeze.

rune.name: Swallow-Spike
rune.description: Your armor responds to your desire to break free of a creature grabbing you by growing spikes. Attacks made by armor with the swallow-spike rune apply the multiple attack penalty as if you had made them with another weapon.

riders.text: When grabbed/restrained, react to attack the grabber with armor spikes.

reactions.name: Grow Spikes
reactions.trigger: You become grabbed, restrained, or otherwise immobilized in a creature's grasp (including being engulfed or swallowed).
reactions.description: The armor attacks the immobilizing creature with a melee Strike: +14 (greater +22), dealing 2d6 piercing (greater 3d6), plus 1d6 extra if the creature is swallowing or engulfing you. Add an item bonus to the attack equal to the armor's AC item bonus, and an item bonus to damage equal to double that. This Strike applies (and increases) the multiple attack penalty as a separate weapon. If the damage equals or exceeds the immobilizing ability's Rupture value, you cut yourself free.

actions.name: Renewed Assault
actions.trigger: You're being held immobilized as described in the Grow Spikes reaction.
actions.description: The armor attacks the immobilizing creature again, as the Grow Spikes reaction.

rune.name: Vitalizing
rune.description: A vitalizing rune draws on positive energy. Against undead, the weapon deals 1d6 persistent vitality damage, and a critical hit also leaves the target enfeebled 1 until the end of your next turn.

rune.name: Vitalizing (Greater)
rune.description: A greater vitalizing rune deals 2d6 persistent vitality damage to undead, and a critical hit leaves the target enfeebled 1 and stupefied 1 while the persistent damage continues.
